title: Minimum Unlocked Indices to Sort Nums
titleCn: 对数字排序的最小解锁下标

detail.title: Minimum Unlocked Indices to Sort Nums
hints: All positions between the first 2 and the last 1 should be unlocked.
All positions between the first 3 and the last 2 should be unlocked.
If the position of the first 3 is less than the position of the last 1, the answer is -1.
